title: Language Change - Disconnecting/Connecting earbuds to check DFU pop up
scenario: Language update pop-up "Update currently not available" persists after reconnecting disconnected earbud on Voyager Free 60+
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
3. In Device Settings, tap on 'Language' option.
4. On the Language screen, select a different language from the list.
5. Tap 'Update Now' button to apply the language change.
6. While the update is in progress, place one earbud (e.g., right earbud) into the charging case so it disconnects.
7. Observe the pop-up that appears on the screen.
8. Reconnect the disconnected earbud by removing it from the charging case.
9. Check if the pop-up dismisses automatically after reconnection.
10. Tap 'Ok' on the pop-up to dismiss it.
11. Repeat steps 1-10 with the other earbud (e.g., left earbud) disconnected instead.
expected: After reconnecting the earbud, the pop-up should dismiss automatically, or the language update should complete without interruption when both earbuds are connected.
